Meaning.En: feeling or showing strong anger; very angry
Meaning.Example: She was mad when she found out he had lied.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả trạng thái tức giận mạnh mẽ sau khi gặp sự bất công hoặc bị phản bội.
Situation.En: Describes intense anger after experiencing unfairness or betrayal.

Meaning.En: suffering from a mental illness that causes irrational behavior; insane
Meaning.Example: He was locked up in a mental hospital after going mad.

Situation.Vi: Dùng trong văn cảnh mô tả hành vi bất thường do rối loạn tâm thần (thường mang tính mô tả chứ không phải chẩn đoán lâm sàng).
Situation.En: Used descriptively (not clinically) to refer to irrational behavior possibly due to mental illness.

Meaning.Vi: điên cuồng vì yêu, say đắm
Meaning.En: overcome with strong emotion, especially love or desire
Meaning.Example: He was madly in love with her from the moment they met.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình yêu mãnh liệt, say đắm đến mức dường như “điên”.
Situation.En: Describes intense romantic passion, almost to the point of obsession.
